acceptance_runs.key_output: unittest OK; DuckDB DDL adjusted to be compatible.

decisions_approved.decision: Proceed with D2.3A core ladder/journal in dev; no paper/live broker changes

notes.note: D2.37 push-readiness transparency: repo_sync_status now includes remotes, push_ready and push_hint, clarifying when Codex can push directly vs when upstream setup is required.
D2.36 operational guard: healthcheck now captures repo_sync_snapshot JSON and supports behind-policy validation (--fail-on-repo-behind) with explicit no-fetch option.
D2.35 repository hygiene: added repo_sync_status utility and optional healthcheck repo-sync stage to inform whether GitHub realignment is recommended before continuing.
D2.34 strict CLI semantics: healthcheck now rejects source-guard usage without progress-report stage, preventing false assurance from misconfigured invocations.
D2.33 guardrail: healthcheck can now enforce expected progress target source, preventing silent percentage drift from unintended target baselines.
D2.32 reporting determinism: fixed project target baseline in state (40 steps) and exposed completion target source (cli/state/default) to explain percentage shifts explicitly.
D2.31 reporting UX: progress_report now supports a single-line heartbeat format for ultra-compact per-phase/per-project status updates.
D2.30 operability refinement: healthcheck now forwards progress-report options (state, compact mode, target steps) and snapshot uses the same target semantics for coherent heartbeat metrics.
D2.29 progress semantics hardening: project target steps are now configurable (state/CLI), and progress_report supports compact markdown heartbeat output for concise per-phase/per-project updates.
D2.28 observability hardening: healthcheck now returns progress_snapshot directly in JSON payload (phase_completion/current_phase/project_completion).
D2.27 operability: integrated progress heartbeat into healthcheck plan via --include-progress-report for single-command status+quality checks.
D2.26 reporting semantics: added current-phase progress indicator (index/total + %) to match operator expectation like 1/7 or 43%.
D2.25 heartbeat metric UX: progress_report now emits explicit percentage progress lines (phase/project) in markdown output.
D2.24 reporting UX: progress_report now emits markdown heartbeat sections to match required per-phase/per-project delivery communication.
D2.23 observability: added deterministic dual progress report (phase/project) to support heartbeat-style delivery updates.
D2.22 boundary safety: submit_order now rejects mismatched/synthetic dataset.mode for paper/live when config is supplied, preventing accidental profile/data-mode drift at order entry.
D2.21 data provenance hardening: validator P0-C2 now binds dataset.mode to profile to reduce accidental environment drift during synthetic->real transitions.
D2.20 synthetic-data safety: explicit dataset.mode in configs + validator CRITICAL guard to prevent synthetic mode on paper/live.
D2.19: introduced scripts/healthcheck.py as single entry-point for baseline checks; validator stage is optional to avoid masking code regressions with environment-specific Gate0 blockers.
D2.18: added regression tests to lock submit_order preflight scoping (dev vs paper semantics).

D2.17 stabilization: fixed datetime UTC compatibility in validator and aligned paper/live submit boundary behavior with broker-unavailable test contract; full unittest suite passes on clean execution DB.
Hotfix normalization: add AckStatus.BROKER_UNAVAILABLE and broker-unavailable dominance in execution/ack_taxonomy for D2.13 paper/live tests. No behavior change for dev unless such event exists.
This patch is intended to be behavior-preserving; run validator + unittest after apply (expected 0/0).
Hotfix for D2.13 tests: accept ack_deadline_ts_utc keyword (absolute deadline timestamp). No functional behavior change intended.
Phase 4 implementation aligned to canonici: F4-T1 scoring + hard filters; F4-T2 kelly_fractional with skew/lower/upper bounds.
D2.15 adds deterministic reducer from journal events -> final order state and invariant checks for journal/state/outcome coherence. Pure helpers + tests; does not change execution unless invoked.
D2.38: introduced mandatory gate tools (verify_manifest/certify_steps) and step index reconciliation; rebuild_manifest now includes new files automatically and eliminates duplicate hash entries.
D2.39: added scripts/git_eol_policy.py and integrated into tools/apply_patch to enforce repo-local CRLF-friendly git config; regression test added.
D2.40: manifest text normalization widened to include dotfiles (e.g., .gitignore) and .lock files, preventing CRLF/LF-related verify_manifest drift under Windows-first git settings.
D2.41: added scripts/project_status.py as single heartbeat for repo sync + phase/project progress; regression tests added.
D2.42: progress_report now distinguishes 'PER FASI (piano canonico)' (task-based) from 'PER TRACK D2' (steps/target) to prevent misinterpretation of near-complete D2 as 'project finished'.
D2.43: ensure .step_index.json is tracked (not ignored) so ZIP baselines made via git archive include it; prevents verify_manifest/certify_steps failing on fresh unzip.
F1-T3: added offline options chain quality checks (bid<=ask, delta range, IV range, parity alerts) with deterministic sampling and report tool + tests.
HF progress tracking alignment: inserted missing F1-T2 completion marker and enabled legacy->canonical task alias mapping for progress reporting.
F6-T1 infra: added paper telemetry tables + metrics/gates tool; API+UI endpoints for operator logging and gate visibility.

steps_completed.title: Smart Limit Order Ladder (dev/dry-run) + journal tests

steps_completed.notes: Fix DuckDB DDL for order_events: remove AUTOINCREMENT, use SEQUENCE/nextval; tests pass locally (DuckDB-only policy).

steps_completed.title: Orders ledger canonico (F3-T4) + reconcile invariants (no pending orders) + tests

steps_completed.summary: Reconcile hardening: scope by run_id, optional report output, add tests.
Outcome classification + reconcile invariant (orders.outcome) + dev timeout simulation
Ack/timeout classification utilities + dev synthetic ACK event trail + tests
Normalization hotfix: classify_ack_status accepts ack_deadline_ts_utc kw (absolute deadline) while preserving prior ack_deadline_s behavior.
Ack taxonomy normalization: BROKER_UNAVAILABLE enum + dominance heuristic (paper/live).
Implement score composito (4 pilastri) + Kelly fractional v11.1 utilities + unit tests (F4-T1/F4-T2). Additive only; no impact on Gate0 execution.
Hotfix: Kelly lower-bound guard for low-RR (b<=1.10) to enforce NO_TRADE on micro-edge cases; aligns with F4 tests without changing scoring weights/filters.
State machine hardening (pure reducer) + reconcile invariants helper + unit tests. Additive only; no Gate0 impact unless called.
Journalâ†’state integration helper (opt-in) using D2.15 deterministic reducer. State machine updated to accept ACKED to match journal transitions.
Stabilization hardening: validator UTC compatibility for Python 3.10/3.11 and submit_order preflight scoped to dev so paper/live boundary returns broker-unavailable semantics.
Submit preflight scope hardening tests: enforce REJECTED_ENV only on dev missing core deps and preserve REJECTED_BROKER_UNAVAILABLE on paper boundary.
Added single-command healthcheck runner with optional validator stage and deterministic exit aggregation; added unit tests for plan and exit behavior.
Dataset mode guard: block synthetic data in paper/live via validator P0-C1 and add regression tests; configs now declare dataset.mode explicitly per profile.
Dataset profile consistency guard (P0-C2): enforce dev->synthetic (warning), paper->paper and live->live (critical) with regression tests.
Submit guard hardening: enforce dataset.mode/profile consistency at submit boundary when config is provided; add Python 3.10 TOML fallback parser for dataset.mode.
Added scripts/progress_report.py for dual advancement reporting (phase + project) and regression tests for phase mapping and payload structure.
Progress report enhanced with markdown mode (--format md) to emit operator-ready PER FASE / PER PROGETTO heartbeat blocks.
Progress report now includes explicit completion percentages for phase and project advancement to provide concise heartbeat metrics.
Progress report now includes explicit current-phase index metric (e.g., 3/6) in addition to phase completion and project completion percentages.
Healthcheck now optionally includes progress_report markdown heartbeat stage for unified quality + status run in a single command.
Healthcheck payload now embeds compact progress_snapshot (phase/project percentages) when progress-report stage is included, without import-path fragility.
Progress report now supports configurable project target steps and compact markdown mode for operator heartbeat output.
Healthcheck now supports progress-report option passthrough (--progress-compact, --progress-target-steps, --progress-state) with aligned progress_snapshot semantics.
Added line-format heartbeat output in progress_report for concise operator updates, with regression coverage.
Progress report now exposes completion_target_source and state now pins project_target_steps=40 to avoid ambiguous project % swings.
Added healthcheck guard --expected-progress-target-source and propagated project_target_source in progress_snapshot for deterministic reporting checks.
Added healthcheck argument validation so --expected-progress-target-source requires --include-progress-report; returns deterministic exit 10 on misuse.
Added scripts/repo_sync_status.py and integrated optional healthcheck repo_sync stage for alignment visibility (ahead/behind/upstream warning).
Healthcheck now supports repo_sync snapshot capture and behind-policy guard with --fail-on-repo-behind/--repo-sync-no-fetch.
Repo sync now reports push readiness metadata (remotes/push_ready/push_hint) and tests cover these fields for deterministic operator guidance.
Operational gate toolchain: verify_manifest + certify_steps + reconcile_step_index + gate runner/apply_patch. Manifest rebuild now scans repo + dedup.
Windows-first Git EOL policy enforcement tool + apply_patch integration; prevents CRLF/LF staging blocks.
Manifest text detection hardening: treat .gitignore/.editorconfig/.gitattributes and *.lock as text; hash/size normalize CRLF->LF; add regression tests.
Added scripts/project_status.py aggregator (repo sync + phase/project progress) with smoke tests.
Progress semantics hardening: add canonical phase-plan task progress (from canonici/02_TEST.md) and clarify D2 track vs overall phases in progress_report/project_status outputs.
Baseline ZIP correctness: track .step_index.json (unignore + commit) so git-archive ZIPs remain self-contained for verify_manifest/certify_steps.

IV Rank (252d) offline ground truth + edge cases
Options chain data quality checks (bid/ask, delta, IV, parity alerts) + offline sample + report tool
DB integrity checks (PK/FK/timestamps/perf) + report tool + tests
Regime classifier (offline) + calibration + feature importance report
Fit HMM rolling 252g (3-state) + early-warning shock lead vs classifier + report tool
WFA backtest Bull Put (IWM) offline synthetic + fold metrics/plots
Paper trading telemetry + gate evaluation (equity snapshots + trade journal) + Operator Console integration
